examples: He maliciously damaged a car with a baseball bat.
If the input string had some maliciously designed script, the script is executed.
These fragments can be approached in unexpected sequences, maliciously or not.
"They maliciously tried to wipe out the operation, " says Vincent Lin, PrediWave's in-house counsel.
Not maliciously, there turns out to be a quote attributed to the Prophet on one of those walls.
